name: Floating Nav
description: Floating bottom navigation bar (CP theme primary navigation)

usageGuidance.when: Building application shell for CP (Customer Portal) theme; use as primary bottom navigation with Execute/Save and optional actions slot
antiPatterns: Don't use FloatingNav with VP/PPM/Maconomy themes - use ShellFooter instead
Don't use multiple FloatingNav instances in the same layout

notes.slots: Use actions slot for custom buttons (e.g. Save, Execute, dropdown)
notes.variant: full for standard bar; compact for reduced height

examples.name: Default floating nav
examples.description: Full variant with Execute and actions
